meaning.en: Africa, flatter, fawn upon, corner, nook, recess
meaning.vi: châu Phi, nịnh bợ, ve vãn, góc, ngóc ngách, chỗ lõm

meaning.en: first Sanskrit alphabet letter, Africa, Awa (old province of Japan), prefixed to names to show intimacy
meaning.vi: first Sanskrit alphabet letter, Africa, Awa (old province of Japan), prefixed to names to show intimacy

meaning.en: homely woman (esp. one with a small low nose, high flat forehead, and bulging cheeks), plain woman, soba in soup with slices of boiled fish paste, shiitake mushrooms, greens, seaweed, etc.
meaning.vi: homely woman (esp. one with a small low nose, high flat forehead, and bulging cheeks), plain woman, soba in soup with slices of boiled fish paste, shiitake mushrooms, greens, seaweed, etc.

meaning.en: to flatter, to play up (to), to curry favor (with), to fawn (on), to cater (to)
meaning.vi: to flatter, to play up (to), to curry favor (with), to fawn (on), to cater (to)

meaning.en: corner, nook, recess, shade, shadow, dark area, dark circles (under the eyes), dark rings, bend (in a road, river, etc.), shading, gradation, kumadori, style of kabuki makeup used for violent roles
meaning.vi: corner, nook, recess, shade, shadow, dark area, dark circles (under the eyes), dark rings, bend (in a road, river, etc.), shading, gradation, kumadori, style of kabuki makeup used for violent roles
gò đất, đập nước (bộ 阝 bên trái)
